title: feat: add DeepSeek V4 via DeepInfra
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Seeking deeper knowledge
gist.blurb: DeepSeek V4 Flash and Pro have officially landed in the hive! Tap into these incredibly powerful new reasoning models for your next big idea.
gist.summary: Integrated DeepSeek V4 Flash and Pro models into the text generation API via DeepInfra.
gist.impact: Developers can now route requests to the latest DeepSeek V4 models for advanced text, reasoning, and coding tasks.
gist.visual_concept: DeepSeek is famously represented by a whale. The scene should feature the Pollinations bee mascot making friends with a cute, chunky pixel art whale surfacing in a cozy garden pond, representing the new DeepSeek V4 integration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sailor hat, greeting a friendly, chunky blue whale surfacing in a small garden pond. Lime green (#ecf874) lily pads and glowing code-plants surround the water. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sailor hat, greeting a friendly, chunky blue whale surfacing in a small garden pond. Lime green (#ecf874) lily pads and glowing code-plants surround the water. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
